commit.subject: LU-7151 tests: fix sanity test_205 on SLES12
commit.message:
LU-7151 tests: fix sanity test_205 on SLES12

Invoke cancel_lru_locks to avoid read from cache.

Signed-off-by: Yang Sheng <yang.sheng@intel.com>
